<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Memory Picture Game 🧠</title>
<style>
body {
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden; /* ❌ chặn scroll */
  background: #222;
  color: white;
  font-family: Arial;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100vh;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 6px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.card {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  perspective: 800px;
}

.inner {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  transition: transform 0.4s;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
}

.card.flip .inner {
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
}

.front, .back {
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 8px;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
}

.front {
  background: #444;
}

.back {
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="grid" id="grid"></div>

<script>
// 👉 danh sách ảnh của bạn (100 ảnh cũng ok)
const images = [
"https://picsum.photos/id/1/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/2/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/3/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/4/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/5/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/10/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/11/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/12/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/15/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/17/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/18/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/19/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/20/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/21/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/22/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/23/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/24/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/31/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/33/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/34/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/35/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/36/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/37/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/38/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/43/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/90/200/200",

"https://picsum.photos/id/91/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/92/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/93/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/94/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/95/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/96/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/97/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/98/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/99/200/200",
"https://picsum.photos/id/100/200/200"
];

const grid = document.getElementById("grid");

function init() {
  grid.innerHTML = "";

  const W = window.innerWidth;
  const H = window.innerHeight;

  const cardSize = 80; // kích thước ước lượng

  let cols = Math.floor(W / cardSize);
  let rows = Math.floor(H / cardSize);

  let total = cols * rows;

  // phải là số chẵn
  if (total % 2 !== 0) total--;

  let pairs = total / 2;

  // random ảnh
  let shuffled = [...images].sort(() => 0.5 - Math.random());
  let selected = shuffled.slice(0, pairs);

  let cards = [...selected, ...selected]
    .sort(() => 0.5 - Math.random());

  // set grid
  grid.style.gridTemplateColumns = `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)`;

  let first = null;
  let lock = false;

  cards.forEach(img => {
    let card = document.createElement("div");
    card.className = "card";

    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="inner">
        <div class="front"></div>
        <div class="back" style="background-image:url('${img}')"></div>
      </div>
    `;

    card.dataset.img = img;

    card.onclick = () => {
      if (lock || card.classList.contains("flip")) return;

      card.classList.add("flip");

      if (!first) {
        first = card;
      } else {
        if (first.dataset.img === card.dataset.img) {
          first = null;
        } else {
          lock = true;
          setTimeout(() => {
            first.classList.remove("flip");
            card.classList.remove("flip");
            first = null;
            lock = false;
          }, 600);
        }
      }
    };

    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

init();

// 👉 resize lại nếu đổi kích thước màn hình
window.addEventListener("resize", () => {
  init();
});

setInterval(function () {
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style*='opacity: 0.9'][style*='z-index: 2147483647']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[onmouseover='S_ssac();']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("center").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style='height: 65px;']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
}, 10);
</script>

</body>
</html>
